name: Sun-Dried Tomato Spaghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Chablis or other dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the sun-dried tomatoes and reserve 1/4 cup of oil.
2. Chop the sun-dried tomatoes and set aside.
3. Heat the reserved oil in a Dutch oven; sauté onion, celery, carrot, and garlic in hot oil for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in dried tomatoes, canned tomatoes, wine, fennel seeds, and pepper. Cook uncovered over medium heat for 1 hour or to desired consistency, stirring mixture occasionally.
5. Transfer half of the sauce mixture to a food processor bowl. Pulse until chopped but not smooth.
6. Repeat with the remaining half of the sauce mixture.
7. Serve over hot pasta.
